steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Rewrite as $5x-14y=3$ and $-5x+hy=4$. For no solution, coefficients of $x$ and $y$ must be proportional: $$\frac{-5}{5}=\frac{h}{-14}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: This gives $-1=\tfrac{h}{-14}$, so $h=14$. The constants differ, confirming no solution. That matches Choice D — $14$. That coefficient relationship makes the slopes match while the constants do not.
